positive: A majestic, stylized lion's head silhouetted against a vibrant, cosmic sunset sky. The lion should have intricately detailed, flowing mane textures that appear both regal and mythic. Accentuate the eyes with a subtle, ethereal glow (iridescent gold/deep sapphire). Incorporate elements of celestial bodies, such as crescent moons and faint nebulae swirls, subtly integrated into the surrounding space. The overall composition must be symmetrical and centered, designed for a striking, high-contrast apparel print. Color palette: deep indigo, burnt orange, gold, and midnight blue. Style: Neo-traditional tribal tattoo art meets cosmic fantasy digital painting. High detail, crisp lines, flat yet dimensional rendering.
negative: blur, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, artifacts, watermark, logo, text, copyright, messy, grain, low detail, distracting elements
